productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Printed Olive T-shirt
description: Composition Olive green printed round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Your weekend wear has a new twist with united colors of benetton's printed top. Layer this cheeky top with a structured blazer or a bolero jacket, an understated scarf, classic form-fitting denims and casual shoes. Wear it with colourful canvas shoes for Kristen Stewart-esque quirk or closed toe kitten heels. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
